主线：一个修炼者提升实力并与多女逐渐结缘的故事。（最后主角实力约以一敌百普通人）
特点：主角行事苟与狗，步步为营，有点搞笑，故事逻辑性不错、与各女恋爱过程及日常很狗及很触人笑点。
基本剧情：主角接手师傅的遗产，一个万亩山庄，且不断开发山庄，并通过开发山庄提升自己的实力（风水与灵气）。开发山庄的过程中拉数位女主投资并与其结缘，同时不断通过扶持小弟和打击敌人维护与扩大自己势力范围。主角基本是有绝对优势时才出击，且文中明面提及的修炼者基本上就他一人。","text_exts":[{"e":47,"s":44,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774203466511369DF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227516420048906060568%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227402659398360779838%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750063739,"group_id":"7402659398360779838","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwmdI4VZwxT1ce6eX4rRkUauHH+xdIn/AkEq49oQimVW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2505124985182346","user_name":"用户25051249"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2505124985182346","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7402659398360779838","book_info":{"abstract":"【御姐+赶山+种蘑菇+乡村日常】
